case_title: HAWK LOU VS. SILVIA ALDANA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION (RE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER NOTICE OF HEARING AND EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOU, HAWK

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOU, HAWK AS TO DEFENDANT ALDANA, SILVIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS  AS PLEASURE HAIRCUT BEAUTY SALON DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOU, HAWK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ALDANA, SILVIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS  AS PLEASURE HAIRCUT BEAUTY SALON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOU, HAWK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDANA, SILVIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS  AS PLEASURE HAIRCUT BEAUTY SALON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: COMMERCIAL SPACE #14 WITHIN THE MISSION MARKET MALL, 2590 MISSION ST., SF, 94110 $7,164.68 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,109.68, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION"
